full_description: Travel Planner is a comprehensive trip planning app designed to help you organize and plan your trips efficiently. With Travel Planner, you can manage your itinerary, research destinations, and keep track of travel documents all in one place. The app allows you to create and customize your itinerary, set reminders for important travel dates, and store your travel documents such as passports, visas, and hotel reservations. You can also research destinations, read reviews, and get recommendations for places to visit, eat, and stay. Whether you're planning a business trip, a family vacation, or a solo adventure, Travel Planner is the perfect tool to help you make the most of your travels.
